subcodes.first_line: The exile was present and, after the dawning of the sun of permission from the horizon of the Divine Will, acted as deputy on thy behalf in that which was decreed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مهاجر حاضر و بعد از اشراق نیر اذن از افق اراده بنیابت آنجناب عمل نمود آنچه را
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
